# Dhruv's blog

> Dhruv Patel's personal blog about technology, Android engineering, and a step towards technology.

## Links

- Feed (RSS): [https://deardhruv.com/index.xml](https://deardhruv.com/index.xml)
- Feed (JSON): [https://deardhruv.com/index.json](https://deardhruv.com/index.json)
